instructions: Copy this file into workspace/QC.json before defining review categories and logging evaluation results.
Keep categories stable enough to compare outputs over time, then add reviews only when real generations exist.
Replace every placeholder category and review entry with project-specific criteria and findings.

categories.label: Replace With Review Category
categories.description: Replace with what this review category should check.

reviews.summary: Replace or remove this template review entry when the file becomes live.

findings.notes: Replace with an example finding or remove this entry before real use.
